revision.comment: Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1240682973|1240682973]] by [[Special:Contributions/Terasail|Terasail]] ([[User talk:Terasail|talk]]) the template is almost always incorrectly used and should hardly (if ever) be used on the page that isn't the current page. The error is correct
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]
#redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|[[Category:IMDb template with invalid id set]]}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|[[Category:Pages using IMDb title with no id set]]}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episode]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | [[Category:Pages using IMDb title instead of IMDb episodes]]{{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 8 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23455888809|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} <!-- is a list of -->
        | Q618779 <!-- award -->
        | Q67325957 <!-- list of awards and nominations --> = awards Awards for
        | Q33999 <!-- actor --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters -->
        | Q66763446 <!-- Wikimedia list of fictional characters by occupation --> = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 <!-- Wikipedia article covering multiple soundtrack releases -->
        | Q482994 <!-- album --> = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} <!--
-->{{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}<!--
-->{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}<!--
-->| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}<!--
-->| 4 = {{Main other|}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|}} }}<!--
-->{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} <!-- instance of -->
| Q21191270 <!-- television series episode -->
| Q21664088 <!-- two-part episode -->
| Q50062923 <!-- three-part episode -->
| Q50914552 <!-- four-part episode -->
| Q99079902 <!-- five-part episode -->
| Q123186929 <!-- six-part episode -->
| Q55422400 <!-- Sarah Jane Smith serial -->
| Q61220733 = <!-- Star Trek episode --> {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 = <!-- television series season --> {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
}}<!--
-->{{#ifeq: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P360}} <!-- is a list of --> | Q21191270 <!-- television series episode --> | {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for list of television episodes}} }}<!--
-->{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} | {{WikidataCheck|property=P345|value={{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}} | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}} | tt{{padleft:{{Trim|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}}}|7}}}}|category=IMDb title ID|qid={{{qid|}}}|nocatsame=1}} }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>

<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/

-->| 4 = {{Main other|}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}<!--
-->}}<!--

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>[https://www.imdb.com/{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}
  | title/{{#if: {{#invoke:ustring|match|1={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|2=^tt}}
    | {{Trim|{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}}}/
    | tt{{padleft:{{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|7}}/
    }}
  | {{#if: {{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}
    | title/{{First word|1={{#property:P345|from={{{qid|}}}}}|sep=,}}/
    | find?q={{urlencode:{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}&s=tt
    }}
  }}{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:If any equal|main|Q618779|Q67325957|Q33999|value={{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}}}} | yes 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P360}} 
        | Q618779 
        | Q67325957  = awards Awards for
        | Q33999  = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        }}
    | {{#if: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}} 
      | {{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|{{{qid_testcases|}}}|P31}}
        | Q63032896 
        | Q66763446  = fullcredits Full cast and crew of
        | Q107974527 
        | Q482994  = soundtrack Soundtrack of
        }}
      }}
    }} {{Trim|{{#if: {{{quotes|}}} | "{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}" | ''{{If empty|{{{2|}}}|{{{title|}}}|{{PAGENAMEBASE}}}}'' }} {{{3|{{{description|}}}}}}}}] at {{#if: {{{link_hide|}}}| IMDb | [[:en:IMDb (identifier)|IMDb]] }}{{EditAtWikidata|{{{1|{{{id|}}}}}}|pid=P345|qid={{{qid|}}}|nbsp=yes}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown={{Main other|}}|preview=Page using [[Template:IMDb title]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | description | id | link_hide | qid | quotes | title }}{{#switch: {{#invoke:String2|matchAny|^tt.........|^tt.......|tt|.........|source={{{1|{{{id}}}}}}|plain=false}}| 1 | 3 = {{Main other|}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID starting with ''tt'' should be followed by seven or eight digits, such as ''tt0000567'' or ''tt12345678''}}| 4 = {{Main other|}}{{Preview warning|IMDb ID should not contain more than eight digits}}}}{{#if: {{{1|{{{id|}}}}}} {{#property:P345}} || {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb title]] is missing ID and not present in Wikidata.}}{{Main other|}} }}{{#switch: {{Wikidata|property|raw|P31}} 
| Q21191270 
| Q21664088 
| Q50062923 
| Q50914552 
| Q99079902 
| Q123186929 
| Q55422400 
| Q61220733 =  {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episode]] should be used for television episodes}}
| Q3464665 =  {{Preview warning|[[Template:IMDb episodes]] should be used for television seasons}}
